name: CLIMB Works Keana Farms
tagline: Eight ziplines over a working North Shore farm with panoramic ocean and mountain views — Oahu's best zipline, period.
parking: Free on-site parking. Check in 40 minutes before tour time
bestTime: Morning tours for cooler temps and best light on the Ko'olau mountains. Book at least 5 days ahead during busy season
kamaaina: 25% kamaaina discount with valid Hawaii ID — brings price from $169 to about $127
talkStory: Three-hour tour with 8 dual ziplines (up to half a mile long), 2 rappels, sky bridges, and an ATV ridgetop ride over a 450-acre working farm that grows macadamia nuts, papaya, and taro. Kids as young as 5 can go (must be accompanied by adult); under 80 lbs can ride tandem with a guide. Weight limit 270 lbs (250 if under 5'10"). Wear closed-toe shoes and clothes you don't mind getting dirty. Lockers provided for phones and valuables. Perfect 5.0 rating on Google with 8,500+ reviews — that's not a typo. The views of the North Shore coastline from the ridgeline are unreal.
